title: A Photographer's Dream Come True in Vogue Magazine
summary: Bryony Coles, a photographer from Belfast, had an amazing surprise when her photoshoot with actor Saoirse-Monica Jackson was featured in Vogue, a famous fashion magazine. She organized the photoshoot at a house in Londonderry to show local creative talent. Bryony felt nervous and thought she might not get a reply when she asked Saoirse on Instagram, but Saoirse said yes and loved her work. Later, Saoirse's team told Bryony that Vogue wanted to use the photos for an article. Bryony was very excited and called it her 'Devil Wears Prada' moment, which means a big dream coming true. She couldn't share the news until Vogue published it, and when it did, everyone celebrated by sharing posts online. This story shows how hard work and reaching out can lead to wonderful opportunities.

background_read: Vogue is a well-known fashion magazine that features photos and stories about celebrities and style. 'The Devil Wears Prada' is a movie about working at a fashion magazine, and people often use this phrase to describe achieving a big goal in fashion or media. Instagram is a social media platform where people can send messages and share pictures, which is how Bryony reached out to Saoirse. Photoshoots are common in magazines to showcase clothing, locations, and talent. This story highlights how using social media and being brave can help make dreams come true in creative fields.
Article_Structure: WHO: Bryony Coles, a photographer from Belfast, and Saoirse-Monica Jackson, an actor from Derry Girls.
WHAT: A photoshoot organized by Bryony with Saoirse was featured in Vogue magazine, making Bryony's dream come true.
WHERE: The photoshoot took place at a house on Lawrence Hill in Londonderry, Northern Ireland.
WHY: To showcase local creative talent and achieve a personal goal, leading to excitement and celebration when published.

perspectives.description: Bryony felt nervous but excited, calling it a dream come true and a 'Devil Wears Prada' moment when her work was featured in Vogue.
